subcodes.first_line: O Ja'far! Zaynu'l-Muqarrabin, upon him be My glory and My loving-kindness, hath time and again made mention of thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا جعفر اسمی زین المقربین علیه بهائی و عنایتی مکرر ذکر شما را نموده یعنی
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @consolation and comfort, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
